behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction describes all three behaviors tested: duplicate unresolved-reference, Final string constant keys, and mixed dict+keyword validation; tests use these exact diagnostic names (unresolved-reference, invalid-argument-type, error[) which are mentioned in the instruction.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes symptoms and expected behaviors without naming specific functions, files, or lines to change.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only check counts of diagnostic types in ty output (unresolved-reference, invalid-argument-type, error[) and cargo check outcomes; no gold-specific identifiers are asserted.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute the ty binary as a subprocess on Python snippets and also run cargo clippy/check commands.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub cannot satisfy both the 'no errors' and 'at least one invalid-argument-type' assertions across tests; behavior requires actual fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All three problems described in instruction.md map to explicit tests (test_no_duplicate_diagnostics, test_constant_key_in_dict_literal, test_mixed_dict_keyword_valid, test_constant_key_type_error).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and have descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is about type checker behavior, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: No typos observed in paths, commands, or names.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction only references the ty_python_semantic crate (the obvious domain) and does not name specific files/lines to modify.
